query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourcecategory="collector_volume" 
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi 
| bytes/1024/1024 as mb 
| timeslice 15m| sum(mb) as mb by collector ,_timeslice
| if (collector matches "*_volume","views",collector) as collector
| total mb as tmb by _timeslice
| if (mb/tmb <.01,"others",collector) as collector 
| sum(mb) as mbby collector,_timeslice | transpose row _timeslice column collector

sources.panelTitle: Collection Over Time by collector > 1% ingest
